creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hi 

Please install ports-mgmt/portlint, and run portlint -AC, could you 
please fix all issus? 

Also Your port don't respect NOPORTEXAMPLES and NOPORTDOCS.  Please fix 
it and submit a followup to this PR. Look at the Porters Handbook for 
instructions.
